whatIsGrndn.question: What is GRNDN?
whatIsGrndn.answer: GRNDN is an AI training platform that builds personalized workout programs based on your goals, experience, equipment, and schedule.

howGenerated.question: How are plans generated?
howGenerated.answer: You complete a short onboarding profile, and GRNDN's AI engine creates a structured protocol with exercises, sets, reps, and progression tailored to you.

changeExercises.question: Can I change exercises?
changeExercises.answer: Yes. GRNDN supports exercise swaps so you can adapt movements to your equipment, preferences, or physical limitations.

beginnerFriendly.question: Is it beginner friendly?
beginnerFriendly.answer: Absolutely. GRNDN adapts volume, complexity, and exercise selection to your experience level—from first-time lifters to advanced athletes.

needGym.question: Do I need a gym?
needGym.answer: No. Tell GRNDN what equipment you have—full gym, home setup, or bodyweight only—and your plan is built around it.

finalCta.headline: Your next level of training starts here.
finalCta.subheadline: Join GRNDN and train with a program built exclusively for you.

legal.privacyBody: GRNDN collects information you provide during onboarding and account creation to generate personalized training plans. We do not sell your personal data. Workout data is stored securely and used only to improve your training experience. Contact us at grndnapp@gmail.com with any privacy questions.
legal.termsBody: GRNDN provides AI-generated workout programming for informational and fitness purposes. Always consult a physician before starting a new training program. GRNDN is not a substitute for professional medical or coaching advice. By using GRNDN, you agree to use the platform responsibly and at your own risk.

generation.error: Could not generate your workout plan.

analysis.whyIntro: Based on your responses, GRNDN prioritized:
analysis.scorecardDisclaimer: Confidence indicators based on your profile — not clinical measurements.

insights.chestVolume: This program prioritizes chest volume while avoiding excessive pressing fatigue.
insights.upperFrequency: This structure increases upper-body frequency while preserving recovery capacity.
insights.lowerBalance: Lower-body patterns are balanced to drive strength without compromising recovery.
insights.strengthFoundation: Compound strength work anchors the week with manageable accessory volume.
insights.vTaperFocus: Back and shoulder emphasis supports a strong V-taper without redundant pressing overlap.
insights.fatLossRecovery: Training density supports fat loss while keeping strength and recovery sustainable.
insights.athleticConditioning: Power and conditioning elements are layered without sacrificing movement quality.
insights.minimalistEfficiency: Every session is trimmed to high-return movements with minimal junk volume.
insights.balancedSplit: The split distributes fatigue evenly across {days} training days.
insights.fullBodyRhythm: Full-body rhythm keeps frequency high with manageable session demand.

results.missingPlan: Generate a protocol from onboarding first, or your session may have expired.

programs.title: My Programs
programs.libraryDescription: Access generated GRNDN programs from any device after signing in with your email magic link.
programs.signInDescription: No password required. We'll send a one-tap magic link to unlock your saved programs.
programs.checkInboxDescription: Open the link and you'll land back here automatically.
programs.emptyDescription: Generate a protocol, then tap "Save My Program" on the results page.
